description: Language policy for GapSight: AI regulatory self-assessment for ML teams. Enforced by CI via check-language-policy.sh.
preferred_phrases: based on publicly available regulatory frameworks
GapSight default, not a regulatory requirement
notes: Applies to: src/locales/en.json, export templates (HTML, JSON, PDF), meta tags, og tags, About page. Marketing copy must follow this policy but is not CI-checked. Review manually before publishing.
